mano_cua.result_summary: 部署失败。@sveltejs/vite-plugin-svelte@1.4.0与vite@2.9.12的ESM/CJS兼容性问题：Named export 'createFilter' not found (vite是CJS模块)。尝试了Node 16/18、降级@sveltejs/kit@next.350、使用原始lockfile，均失败。svelte.config.js使用kit.vite选项在新版SvelteKit中被移除，降级又遇到vite-plugin-svelte兼容问题。

deploy_notes.failure_reason: ESM/CJS incompatibility between @sveltejs/vite-plugin-svelte@1.4.0 and vite@2.9.12. config.kit.vite removed in newer SvelteKit. Downgrading kit version also fails with same vite-plugin-svelte issue.
